rules.name: bare-except
rules.message: Bare except clause — catches all exceptions including SystemExit and KeyboardInterrupt.
rules.fix_hint: Specify an explicit exception type, e.g. except ValueError: or except Exception:.

rules.name: broad-except
rules.message: Overly broad exception catch — masks bugs by swallowing unrelated errors.
rules.fix_hint: Catch specific exception types relevant to the operation; re-raise or log if a broad catch is truly needed.

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to environment variables or a vault; load via os.environ or a config library.

rules.name: eval-exec-usage
rules.message: eval/exec usage — risks arbitrary code execution.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with ast.literal_eval for data parsing or a safer alternative; avoid dynamic code execution.

rules.name: print-statement
rules.message: Print statement — use a structured logger instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with logging.info/debug/warning from the logging module or structlog.

rules.name: mutable-default-argument
rules.message: Mutable default argument — shared across all calls and causes subtle bugs.
rules.fix_hint: Use None as the default and create the mutable object inside the function body.

rules.name: time-sleep-in-async
rules.message: time.sleep blocks the event loop in async code.
rules.fix_hint: Use asyncio.sleep() in async functions or run in a thread executor if sync sleep is unavoidable.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named functions or use early returns / guard clauses.

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a module-level constant with a descriptive UPPER_SNAKE_CASE name.

rules.message: SQL query built with f-string — use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
rules.name: sql-injection-risk
rules.fix_hint: Use parameterized queries instead of string formatting

rules.message: Path construction from user input — validate and sanitize to prevent path traversal
rules.name: path-traversal-risk
rules.fix_hint: Use pathlib and validate paths against allowed directories

file_size._note: Lines of code. Test files and migrations get more room.

function_size._note: Detected via AST or indent-based heuristic, not grep.

boundaries.name: No ORM imports in domain/service layer
boundaries.message: Domain/service layer must not import ORM libraries directly — use repository pattern or dependency injection
